sv.ref: AmazingFoodMadeEasy (Logsdon) — sous vide beef braise guide
sv.note: Braise-like collagen breakdown: 'Firm but shreddable 156F (68.9C) for 1 to 2 days' - 68C/30h sits squarely in this brisket-slice range.

smoke.note: tgt 94->95: recipe 'magical around 203F (95C)', finish window 195-205F. Hot finish 105C, ~3h to set bark after SV.

smoke_only.note: 'cook at about 225F (107C)'; '12 to 18 hours for a whole packer' if wrapped at 150F.

safe.ref: Baldwin — Practical Guide to Sous Vide (pasteurization tables)
safe.note: Whole-muscle beef displayed floor 63C (145F USDA instant-safe). SV path pasteurizes by time at >=54.4C; 68C/30h vastly exceeds pasteurization (60C/50mm->2.5h).

order_smokesv.note: Intact whole-muscle: only surface needs pasteurizing. Warm-smoke <=2h (danger-zone total <4h), then 68C bath pasteurizes surface.

rationale: Kept SV 68/30h and pit 225F(110C)/12h; nudged final target 94->95C to match AmazingRibs 203F.

sv.ref: AmazingFoodMadeEasy — sous vide short ribs guide
sv.note: 'Firm but shreddable 156F (68.9C) for 1 to 2 days'; longer=more tender, so 68C/36h fuller braise.

smoke.note: 'cooked until internal temperature reaches about 203F' = 95C. Hot smoke finish 105C ~3h.

smoke_only.note: Pit 'Heat smoker to 250-275F', ~4-5h smoke + ~1h wrapped; conservative 110C gives ~7h.

safe.note: Whole-muscle beef displayed floor 63C. 68C/36h far exceeds pasteurization (60C/50mm->2.5h).

order_smokesv.note: Intact rib meat; warm-smoke <=2h for smoke ring, then 68C bath surface-pasteurizes.

rationale: All values confirmed against AmazingRibs (203F=95C, 250-275F pit) and Logsdon braise table; nothing changed.

sv.ref: AmazingFoodMadeEasy — sous vide beef cheek guide
sv.note: 'Really Fall Apart: 176F for 12 to 24 Hours (80.0C)' - 80C/24h matches full fall-apart cheek.

smoke.ref: AmazingRibs — Slow Smoked Chuck Roast (collagen-cut analog)
smoke.note: Collagen-rich beef finishes ~95C (pulled chuck 205F=96C). Brief 105C smoke finish.

smoke_only.note: Beef braising ~225F (107C); small dense cheeks ~8h to fall-apart.

safe.note: Whole-muscle beef displayed floor 63C. 80C bath pasteurizes almost immediately vs 60C table.

order_smokesv.note: Intact whole-muscle cheek; short warm-smoke then 80C bath fully pasteurizes surface.

rationale: 80C/24h confirmed as exact 'really fall apart' cheek setting; smoke target 95C per AmazingRibs collagen method.

sv.note: 'More Fall Apart: 165F (73.9C) for 1 to 2 days' - 74C/24h matches fall-apart chuck.

smoke.note: Sliced 180F(82C); pulled 205F(96C). tgt 95 between slice/pull. Hot finish 110C ~2h.

safe.note: Whole-muscle beef displayed floor 63C. 74C/24h far exceeds pasteurization.

order_smokesv.note: Intact chuck; warm-smoke <=2h for ring, then 74C bath surface-pasteurizes.

rationale: 74C/24h confirmed fall-apart braise cell; pit 110C and 95C target confirmed; no change.

sv.ref: AmazingFoodMadeEasy — sous vide short ribs guide
sv.note: 'Firm but shreddable 156F (68.9C) for 1 to 2 days'; 68C/24h for tender-but-intact rib meat.

smoke.note: tgt 94->95: 'thickest part of the meat should be 203F (95C)'. Hot finish 110C ~3h.

safe.note: Whole-muscle beef displayed floor 63C. 68C/24h exceeds pasteurization.

order_smokesv.note: Intact rib meat; warm-smoke <=2h for ring, then 68C bath surface-pasteurizes.

rationale: Pit 225F(110C)/6h and SV 68/24h confirmed; corrected final target 94->95C to match AmazingRibs 203F.

sv.ref: AmazingFoodMadeEasy — sous vide short ribs guide
sv.note: 'Firm but shreddable 156F (68.9C) for 1 to 2 days' - meatier chuck short rib at 68C/24h.

safe.note: Whole-muscle beef displayed floor 63C. 68C/24h exceeds pasteurization.

order_smokesv.note: Intact chuck rib; warm-smoke <=2h for ring, then 68C bath surface-pasteurizes.

rationale: All confirmed: SV 68/24h and 95C/pit per AmazingRibs beef short ribs; no change.

sv.ref: AmazingFoodMadeEasy — sous vide beef shank guide
sv.note: 'More Fall Apart: 165F (73.9C) for 1 to 2 days' - 74C/24h for osso buco texture.

smoke.ref: AmazingRibs — Slow Smoked Chuck Roast (collagen-cut analog)
smoke.note: Very collagen/tendon-rich; finish near pulled beef 205F (96C). Brief 110C smoke.

safe.note: Whole-muscle beef displayed floor 63C. 74C/24h exceeds pasteurization.

order_smokesv.note: Intact shank cross-cut; warm-smoke <=2h, then 74C bath surface-pasteurizes.

rationale: 74C/24h confirmed osso buco setting; 96C finish kept for heavy connective tissue.

sv.note: 75C/24h -> 79C/'24-48': recipe cooks at 175F (79C) for 40-48 hours; very high collagen needs hotter/longer braise. Anova ragout corroborates 82C/24h.

smoke.ref: AmazingRibs — Slow Smoked Chuck Roast (collagen-cut analog)
smoke.note: Finishes like pulled beef ~95-96C (203-205F). Brief 110C smoke.

smoke_only.note: Small bone-in segments at ~225F(110C) reach fall-apart in ~6h.

safe.note: Whole-muscle beef displayed floor 63C. 79C bath pasteurizes essentially on contact.

order_smokesv.note: Intact bone-in oxtail; short warm-smoke then 79C bath fully pasteurizes surface.

rationale: Raised oxtail 75C/24h -> 79C/24-48h (two recipes show dense collagen needs hotter/longer braise); smoke target kept 95C.

sv.ref: AmazingFoodMadeEasy — sous vide short ribs/plate guide
sv.note: Plate = same primal as plate short ribs; 'Firm but shreddable 156F (68.9C) for 1 to 2 days'.

smoke.note: Plate short ribs 'internal temperature reaches about 203F' = 95C. Hot finish 110C ~3h.

smoke_only.note: Pit 250-275F, ~5-6h; conservative 110C gives ~7h for the fatty plate.

safe.note: Whole-muscle beef displayed floor 63C. 68C/24h exceeds pasteurization.

order_smokesv.note: Intact plate; warm-smoke <=2h for ring, then 68C bath surface-pasteurizes.

rationale: Confirmed as plate/brisket-family cut: SV 68/24h and 95C/pit per AmazingRibs; no change.

sv.note: 'More Fall Apart: 165F (73.9C) for 1 to 2 days' - 74C/24h for pull-apart chuck roast.

smoke.note: Sliced 180F(82C); pulled 205F(96C). tgt 95 slice/pull midpoint. Hot finish 110C ~2h.

safe.note: Whole-muscle beef displayed floor 63C. 74C/24h exceeds pasteurization.

order_smokesv.note: Intact chuck roast; warm-smoke <=2h for ring, then 74C bath surface-pasteurizes.

rationale: 74C/24h confirmed fall-apart braise cell; pit 110C confirmed; no change.
